messages.content: You are VASP Refiner. Return ONLY strict inter.json.

USER_INSTRUCTION:
Keep captions clear and cinematic. Show the right image exactly when the spoken entity is mentioned.

PLANNER_TEXT:
EDIT PLAN
Global Style: Clean caption-first historical short with minimal clutter.
Audio Decision: Use audio_1 as full timeline backbone from 0.000 to 8.000.
Caption Style: Bold white captions with black stroke; highlight only important words.
Visual Style: Semantic image reveal based on spoken entity and phrase meaning.
Background Style: Dark neutral gradient for readability.
Segmentation Rule: Split on sentence/semantic shift and keep caption groups 1-5 words aligned to word map.
Segment 1
Time: 0.200-1.000
Purpose: Introduce Ada Lovelace as core entity.
Elements Used: audio_1, caption_track_1, image_1
Caption Decision: Group: 'Ada Lovelace'.
Visual Decision: Show image_1 on Ada Lovelace mention.
Animation Decision: fade in.
Placement Decision: upper-center image, lower-safe captions.
Timing Events:
- time: 0.200 event: show image_1
Transition Out: Soft crossfade.
Engagement Note: Semantic match.
Segment 2
Time: 1.000-2.400
Purpose: Emphasize contribution.
Elements Used: audio_1, caption_track_1, image_2
Caption Decision: Group: 'wrote the first algorithm.'
Visual Decision: Show image_2 for algorithm phrase.
Animation Decision: fade transition.
Placement Decision: upper-center image, lower-safe captions.
Timing Events:
- time: 1.000 event: image switch
Transition Out: Light fade.
Engagement Note: Reinforce meaning.

ELEMENT_COMPACT:
version:1.0
video:1080x1920 fps=30 output=output/a2v_video.mp4 duration=8.000
element:audio_1 type=music source_uri=assets/inputs/audio.wav timing=0.000-8.000
element:image_1 type=image source_uri=assets/inputs/images/person.jpg timing=0.000-8.000 about='Portrait of Ada Lovelace' aim='Reveal when Ada Lovelace is mentioned; keep upper-center.'
element:image_2 type=image source_uri=assets/inputs/images/notes.jpg timing=0.000-8.000 about='Mathematical notes and formulas' aim='Use during discovery/explanation phrase.'
element:caption_track_1 type=caption timing=0.000-8.000 transcript='Ada Lovelace wrote the first algorithm.' word_timing_map=[{'text':'Ada','start':0.20,'end':0.45},{'text':'Lovelace','start':0.46,'end':0.90},{'text':'wrote','start':1.00,'end':1.35},{'text':'the','start':1.36,'end':1.48},{'text':'first','start':1.49,'end':1.82},{'text':'algorithm.','start':1.83,'end':2.40}]

Return only valid inter.json.
